faq.q: Best time to visit shimla tour package?
faq.a: October to March is ideal with pleasant weather. Monsoons offer lush greenery but may limit outdoor activities.

faq.q: How much does a shimla tour package trip cost from India?
faq.a: A standard package starts from ₹9,999/person. Costs vary by hotel category, travel mode, and trip duration.

faq.q: Is shimla tour package suitable for family and kids?
faq.a: Yes, shimla tour package is very family-friendly. NavSafar ensures all stays and activities are safe and kid-appropriate.

faq.a: Our travel experts share a personalised list of top spots, local markets, and hidden gems when you book with us.
